pageContext.name: Bloodshot
pageContext.description: Sideshow and threezero are pleased to announce the new Bloodshot Figure!  Bloodshot is a violent but heroic super-soldier with nanites in his blood that give him special powers. He is the first hero of the Valiant Universe joining our FigZero S series!  Join the iconic superheroes in the fight to save the world and show how you #StayValiant!  The BLOODSHOT action figure also includes an exclusive miniature collectible Valiant comic! The BLOODSHOT Action Figure Special Collector's Edition introduces the iconic nanite fueled supersoldier to fans everywhere in a brutally action-packed story and even contains the first-ever printed edition of THE NFT GIFT short comic featuring Tama the GEOMANCER, the ETERNAL WARRIOR and IVAR, TIMEWALKER. Experience the thrilling Valiant Universe in more than one way!
